creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


First off, you might want to take another look at the statement 
at the top of the Makefile for this port. :) 

Second, we only use PORTREVISION when the port is updated without 
an actual change from the vendor. In this case, the way to handle 
the version number is the way that I did it earlier today. 

Doug
